title: Pi Kappa Epsilon Donates $13,280 for Firefighter Behavioral Health Programs
summary: Fire Chief Mike Maz presents item 28: acceptance of $13,280.52 donation from Pi Kappa Epsilon fraternity (Syracuse University chapter) for the Fire Department's Behavioral Health Assistant Program and Critical Incident Stress Management teams. Funds support training firefighters to identify and support colleagues experiencing psychological or mental health issues after difficult calls.
